acdc.name: acdc
acdc.domain_notes: Cardiac cine MRI dataset with two labeled cardiac phases per subject: ED and ES. Provides pathology group labels and ground-truth segmentations for LV, RV, and Myo.

ucsf_pdgm.name: ucsf_pdgm
ucsf_pdgm.domain_notes: Preoperative diffuse glioma MRI dataset with group labels (GradeII/GradeIII/GradeIV), patient-level metadata fields (e.g., age, sex, idh_status, mgmt_status, extent_of_resection, survival_days, survival_status), and tumor subregion segmentations (whole tumor, enhancing tumor, necrotic core, edema).

L0.name: Untestable / Out-of-Scope
L0.description: Requires metadata, structures, modalities, or measurements not available in the dataset registry or not exposed through the current SAT-only analysis interface.

L1.name: Metadata-Only (Univariate)
L1.description: Uses only metadata fields (no segmentation-derived measurements) and univariate analyses (single predictor/outcome). Includes simple survival comparisons with a single grouping variable (e.g., KM/log-rank) as long as no multivariable adjustment is required.

L2.name: Imaging-Only (Single Metric)
L2.description: Uses a single segmentation-derived measurement per patient (volume, EF, mass) with univariate statistics (group differences / correlations).

L3.name: Engineered Imaging Features
L3.description: Uses engineered imaging features that combine multiple basic measurements (ratios, fractions, indices) with univariate statistics.

L4.name: Mixed (Metadata + Imaging)
L4.description: Combines metadata and imaging-derived measurements in low-dimensional (bivariate) analyses, stratified analyses, or fixed-threshold rules (no tuning). Includes survival with a single imaging-derived predictor.

L5.name: Multivariate / Survival / Advanced
L5.description: Requires multivariable models (>=2 predictors/covariates), confound adjustment, or protocol-heavy procedures (e.g., variable selection, threshold search, interactions). Survival is L5 only when multivariable (e.g., CoxPH with covariates).

acdc.LVEDV_ml: Volume of LV cavity at ED (mL)
acdc.LVESV_ml: Volume of LV cavity at ES (mL)
acdc.RVEDV_ml: Volume of RV cavity at ED (mL)
acdc.RVESV_ml: Volume of RV cavity at ES (mL)

hypotheses.hypothesis: HCM patients have higher left atrial fibrosis burden than normal controls on late gadolinium enhancement MRI

ground_truth.rationale: ACDC provides cine short-axis MRI and standard cardiac structures, but not late-gadolinium-enhancement (LGE) MRI required to quantify left-atrial fibrosis burden. Therefore the target quantity is not available with the current dataset modalities/interface.

hypotheses.hypothesis: DCM patients have lower global longitudinal strain (GLS) than normal controls

ground_truth.rationale: GLS is not directly available from the current segmentation-derived metrics (volume/mass/EF). Without a strain extraction module, this is not testable within the present framework constraints.

hypotheses.hypothesis: DCM patients have higher systolic blood pressure than normal controls

ground_truth.rationale: Blood pressure is not present in the ACDC metadata fields (only height/weight/frames), so this cannot be tested with the current data interface.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Mean tumor ADC is associated with overall survival in glioblastoma patients

ground_truth.rationale: Although ADC/DTI-derived maps can exist in the raw UCSF-PDGM release, this benchmark version does not treat ADC/MD as supported observations/metrics and does not expose intensity-based ROI statistics (e.g., mean ADC) via the current SAT-only interface; therefore this hypothesis is untestable in-framework.

hypotheses.hypothesis: IDH-mutant gliomas are more likely to be located in the frontal lobe than IDH-wildtype gliomas

ground_truth.rationale: Tumor location-atlas features are not part of the UCSF-PDGM metadata fields in this framework, and SAT does not provide atlas registration outputs; therefore this is not testable here.

metadata.description: Tiered hypothesis bank (v5): all 64 hypotheses have dataset-derived ground_truth with full statistics (p-values, effect sizes, sample sizes, assumption checks, power analysis). L0 hypotheses have source=capability_spec (INVALID), all others have source=dataset_derived.

ground_truth.note: All 64 hypotheses have ground_truth populated. L0 hypotheses use capability_spec (deterministic INVALID). L1-L5 use dataset_derived with computed statistics from GT segmentation masks and patient metadata.
